title: Tracing the timeline of Alberta's historic teachers' strike
author: Kajal Dhaneshwari
notes: Strike dates: Oct 6 strike; Oct 7 lockout notice; Oct 9 lockout; Oct 14 ATA counter-proposal + Parent Payment Program ($30/child/day); Oct 15 govt review. Tier 3 local. outlet_id 'airdrie-city-view' not in outlet-database. Corroborate dates w/ Tier 2 where possible.
